# Rewrite the projects section — remove placeholder cards

## Context

`index.html` is a single-file personal page. Its "What I'm working on" section (index.html:225-235) currently contains two placeholder cards — "Project One" and "Project Two" — both linking to `#` with filler descriptions. The user wants that section rewritten with the placeholders gone, and the page kept as one self-contained file.

## Approach
